Why Start Your BCA Here

  • 1
    Choose in-demand tech tracks: Data Science, Cloud, AI, Cyber Security and more.
  • 2
    Study 100% online, anytime, from anywhere. No campus, no commute.
  • 3
    Just ₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
  • 4
    Real, hands-on coding, included micro-credentials and mentor support from semester 1.

SPECIAL POWER 1

Master AI Tools from Semester 1

AI isn't an afterthought here - you apply real AI tools from your very first semester, in every subject.

SPECIAL POWER 2

Micro-Credentials Included - No Extra Cost

Earn 2 credits per micro-credential alongside your BCA - Google AI Essentials, Power BI, Financial Modelling & more, taught by industry experts.

Powered byGoogleMicrosoftIndustry Experts
SPECIAL POWER 3

Learn Your Way, Fully Supported

Flexible online learning with weekend live classes, a dedicated batch owner, virtual labs and a Sunday Social network - support every step of the way.
